case_title: VICTOR MARTIN MARTIN VS. DELTA GENERAL ENGINEERING PC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-28-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF VICTOR MARTIN MARTIN ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER KENNETH WRIGHT. DEFENDANT DELTA GENERAL ENGINEERING PC DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-27-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DELTA GENERAL ENGINEERING PC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,680.00 FILED BY MARTIN MARTIN, VICTOR AS TO DEFENDANT DELTA GENERAL ENGINEERING PC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2019 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTIN MARTIN, VICTOR ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTIN MARTIN, VICTOR AS TO DEFENDANT DELTA GENERAL ENGINEERING PC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTIN MARTIN, VICTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DELTA GENERAL ENGINEERING PC $1,680.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,680.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
